entries.source: This translation is provided for readability. If there is any conflict, the English version controls.

entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Za brisanje vaših osebnih podatkov. Ako napravite ta zahtjev, mi bomo izbrisati osobne podatke ki držimo o vama kao datum vašeg zahtjeva iz naših evidencija in usmjeriti sve ponudnike storitev da učine isto. V nekim primerevima, brisanje se lahko izvršiti deidentifikacijom informacija. Ako odlučite izbrisati vaše osobne podatke, možda nečete moči uporabljati odredžene funkcije ki zahtijevaju da vaši osebni podatki rade. Da prestanete z prodajom vaših osebnih podatkov. Ne prodajemo ali ne iznajmljujemo vaše osobne podatke bilo kojoj trečoj osobi za bilo koju namen. Mi ne prodajemo vaše osobne podatke za novčanu naknadu. Medžutim, pod nekim okolnostima, predennos osebnih podatkov na treču osobu, ali unutar naše obitelji tvrtki, bez novčanog računa lahko se smatrati “prodajom” v skladu z kalifornijskim zakonom. Vi ste jedini vlasnik vaših osebnih podatkov in lahko zatražiti odkrivanje ali brisanje v kadar koli. Ako podnesete zahtjev za prestanak prodaje vaših osebnih podatkov, mi bomo prestati obavljati takve transfere. Imajte na umu, ako nas pitate da izbrišete ali prestanete prodavati vaše podatke, to lahko utjecati na vaše iskustvo z nama, a možda nečete moči sudjelovati v odredženim programima ali storitevma članstva ki zahtijevaju uporaba vaših osebnih podatkov kako bi funkcionirali. Ali, ni v kim okolnostima, mi bomo diskriminirati protiv vas za ostvarivanje vaših prava. Da biste ostvarili svoja prava na zaštitu podatkov opisana gore, molimo vas da pošaljete zahtjev(-e) putem e-pošte: support@inspir.app Vaša prava na zaštitu podatkov, opisana gore, obuhvačena su CCPA, ukratko za Kalifornijski Zakon o zasebnosti potrošača. Da biste saznali više, posjetite službenu spletno stran Kalifornije Zakonodavne informacije. CCPA je stupio na snagu 01/01/2020.

entries.source: Treat each turn as collaborative work: draft, critique, revise, ask for a decision, update open questions, and hand the next useful move to either the user or AI. Challenge weak ideas when the selected mode calls for it.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Pokušajte v Flashcard Builder. Ako trebate razumeti temu preden izrade kavojne, počnite v Saznajte bilo kar. Ako želite tlak nakon pregleda kavojne, predžite v Quiz Me On Trivia ali Viva Practice.

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Pojem, argument, problem, besedilo ali odločitev spremenite v osredotočeno verigo vprašanj. Vaš učni sopotnik prisluhne vsakemu odgovoru, začrta predpostavke in vrzeli ter vas usmeri k vaši končni sintezi. Poskusite: "Pomagaj mi razumeti oportunitetni strošek."

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Za razliku od generičkog chatbota, inspir organizira UI oko načina učenja tako da učenci mogu začeti z vrstom pomoči ki im je potrebna: savjeti, vprašanja, kvizi, aktivni opoziv, uloga, rasprava, ali povratne informacije.

entries.source: Unmute film
entries.value: Nepromjenjivi film

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Razčleni zgodovinske dogodke skozi vzroke, sprožilce, posledice in alternativne možnosti.

entries.source: Use
entries.value: Koristi

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: Koristite "{value1}" kao limuzinu, a ne kao zaustavnu točku. Najjača seja učenja kreče se od čitanja v opoziv, povratnu informaciju, in jedan vidljivi sljedeči korak.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: Uporabi ritem odmorov 50/10

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: Koristite kompaktni tablicu za dani odgovor, ispravnu ideju, ponapako in sljedeči potez.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: Upotrijebite iskaznicu o vjerodostojnosti in vprašanja kako biste raziščili sljedeče.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.
entries.value: Koristite duboki radni ugovor z ishodom, blok načrt, pravila, in pregled.

entries.source: Use a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.
entries.value: Koristite vodeni put za prelazak iz zbunjenosti v primere, provjere in opoziv.

entries.source: Use a live AI learning mode to turn this guide into questions, feedback, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Koristite živi UI način učenja pretvoriti ta vodnik v vprašanja, povratne informacije, primere in sljedeče korake.

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Koristite način života ko znate točnu točku zbunjenosti in želite sljedeče objašnjenje, vprašanje, savjet ali pregled petlje.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Koristite način podešavanja za savjete, vprašanja, kvizte, flash kartice, pisanje povratne informacije, ali načrtiranje.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: Koristi pokretač za prompt

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Koristite strukturiranu lekciju ko znate područje kursa in želite sekvencirano objašnjenje ali praksa set.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: Koristite stol z prednjim, stražnjim, savjetnim in zajedničkim zamkama.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Koristite UI kao trener za razumevanje, praksu in povratnu informaciju umjesto prečice ki tiho uklanja učenje.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Koristite UI kao programski trener, projektni partner, tumač podatkov in pomočnik v raziščivanju uz održavanje učenca v petlji.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: Koristite UI kao studijski rad, a ne prečac.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: Koristite UI povratnu informaciju kako biste oštrili strukturu in jasnoču bez gubitka vlastitog glasa.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Koristite UI za savjete, objašnjenja, provjeru pogreški in recenziju petlje. Ne tražite od njega da proizvede končni odgovor ki ne lahko razložiti.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
entries.value: Koristite UI za sljedeči savjet, provjeru koraka, ali nacrt povratne informacije uz zadržavanje konačnog razmišljanja in glas svoje.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Koristi UI za razmišljanje oko odgovora

entries.source: Use AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and evidence labels without confusing roleplay for sources.
entries.value: Koristite UI povijesne svjette, persona simulacije, debatu, filozofiju in oznake dokaza bez zbunjivanja uloga za izvore.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: Uporabi pomoč z UI pri domači nalogi za namige, preverjanja korakov, matematično sklepanje in povratne informacije pri pisanju, pri tem pa naj končno delo ostane tvoje.

entries.source: Use AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, evidence, and interpretation clear.
entries.value: Koristite UI simulacije kao skele za učenje uz održavanje izvora, dokaza in tumačenja jasnog.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: Uporabi časovno potovanje z UI, zgodovinske pogovore in vajo razprave za raziskovanje konteksta, dokazov, argumentov in perspektiv.

entries.source: Use AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.
entries.value: Koristite UI da biste testirali svoje razmišljanje, pretpostavke na površini in poboljšali odluke.

entries.source: Use AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.
entries.value: Koristite UI da usporite razmišljanje, preverite korake, napake v ispravljanju grešaka in vajajte koncepte.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Civics Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Art Appreciation Guide, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Civics Coach. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Art Appreciation Guide, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: Use badge names, criteria, tiers, and proof examples.
entries.value: Koristite nazive, kriterije, stupnjeve in dokazne primere.

entries.source: Use before/after snippets, revision priorities, and concise rationale.
entries.value: Koristiti preden/nakon rezanja, revizija prioriteta, in koncizni obrazloženje.

entries.source: Use Brainstorm Ideas to create several routes before choosing one.
entries.value: Koristite Brainstorm Ideje za stvaranje nekoliko ruta preden nego kar odaberete jedan.

entries.source: Use calendars, checklists, and risk flags.
entries.value: Koristi kalendare, popise in zastave rizika.

entries.source: Use Career Explorer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Roleplay Scenario. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Career Explorer, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Roleplay Scenario. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: Use case
entries.value: Koristi veličinu slova

entries.source: Use case file, choices, outcome, and learning note.
entries.value: Koristite datoteku primera, izbore, ishod in učenje note.

entries.source: Use Case Study Simulator when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Feynman Tutor. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Koristi primereve

entries.source: Use challenge cards, points, rounds, and debrief.
entries.value: Koristite izazov kartice, bodte, runde, in ispitivanje.

entries.source: Use citation entries plus a missing-fields checklist.
entries.value: Koristi unose citiranja plus popis polja ki nedostaju.

entries.source: Use Civics Coach when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try History Cause-and-Effect. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Civics Coach, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi History Cause-and-Effect. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: use client
entries.value: uporabi odjemalca

entries.source: Use Code Tutor for concepts, Project Coach for product ideas, Data Interpreter for datasets, and Study Plan Builder for a learning roadmap.
entries.value: Upotrijebite programski vodnik za koncepte, Projektni trener za ideje proizvoda, Interpreter podatkov za podatkovne podatke, in izrada načrta za učenje načrta.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or homework modes to isolate the exact point where reasoning breaks.
entries.value: Koristite kodu Tutor ali načine zadače kako biste izolirali točnu točku kjer razmišljanje pauzira.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Koristite koda Tutor ali projekt trener pretvoriti nejasan cilj v mali testabilni sljedeči korak.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Interview Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Code Tutor, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Interview Coach. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.value: Uporabi Collaborative Instruction, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Socratic Instruction. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Collaborative Instruction, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: Use commitment cards, check-in scripts, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Koristite aktivne kartice, check-in skripte, in načrtte za oporavak.

entries.source: Use compact staged sections: setting, time slice, persona kernel, dossier wall, historian sidecar, recommended opening questions, then in-character exchanges with occasional claim labels and debrief on request.
entries.value: Koristite kompaktne scenirane dijelte: postavljanje, vremenski rez, persona jezgra, zid dosjea, povjesničarski bočni automobil, preporučena vprašanja za otvaranje, a zatim v character razmjene z povremeno zahtjeve etikete in ispitivanje na zahtjev.

entries.source: Use compact UI-like sections: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence, and Field Notes. End major turns with meaningful choices.
entries.value: Koristite kompaktne UI-like sekcije: Pasoš, Putničke savjetodavne, Dolazak Scene, Lokacija, Identitet, Društvena pravila, Sat dogadžaja, V blizini Osobe, Objekti, Izbori, Dokazi, in Polje Bilješke. Kraj velike skreče z značajnim izborima.

entries.source: Use compact workroom sections such as Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, and Next action. Show suggested edits or diffs before merging when rewriting.
entries.value: Koristite kompaktne radne prostorije kao kar su Zajednički artefakt, UI doprinos, Ugradženi komentari, Dnevnik odluka, Otvorena vprašanja, in Sljedeča akcija. Prikažite predložene uredživanja ali razlike preden spajanja prilikom ponovnog pisanja.

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Koristite stranice za usporedbu za pretraživanje rute v akciju.

entries.source: Use comparison tables and next-step experiments.
entries.value: Koristite tablice za usporedbu in eksperimente sljedečeg koraka.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Spaced Review. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Concept Map Builder, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Spaced Review. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Concept Map Builder, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: Use concise claims, evidence prompts, and a final debate recap when asked.
entries.value: Koristite koncizne trditve, dokaze podstiče, in konačnu raspravu na zahtjev.

entries.source: Use concise code snippets, comments only when useful, and test cases.
entries.value: Koristite koncizne šifre, komentare samo ko je korisno, in testiranje primereva.

entries.source: Use concise drawing instructions, label lists, and visual checkpoints.
entries.value: Koristite koncizne upute za crtanje, popis etiketa, in vizualne kontrolne punktte.

entries.source: Use Cornell sections: cues, notes, summary, and recall checks.
entries.value: Koristite Cornell dijelte: znakte, bilješke, povzetek, in opoziv provjere.

entries.source: Use course cards, resource lists, and weekly workload tables.
entries.value: Koristite kurs kartice, resursne liste, in tjedno radno opterečenje tablice.

entries.source: Use Creative Brainstormer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Motivation Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use dashboard cards, trend notes, weak spots, and next actions.
entries.value: Koristite tablo kartice, trend note, slabe točke, in sljedeče akcije.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter to ask what the data says, what it does not say, and what to check next.
entries.value: Koristite Interpreter podatkov kako biste pitali kar podatki kažu, kar ne kažu, in kar preveriti sljedeče.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Source Critic. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use deadline tables, risk flags, and next actions.
entries.value: Koristite rokte, zastave rizika in sljedeče akcije.

entries.source: Use debate and cause-effect modes to compare explanations and write a stronger argument.
entries.value: Koristite načine rasprave in uzroka za usporedbu objašnjenja in pisanje jačeg argumenta.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to define the position, burden of proof, and opposing view.
entries.value: Koristite debatu bilo koju temu kako bi definirali poziciju, opterečenje dokaza, in suprotan pogled.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to separate evidence, values, and assumptions.
entries.value: Koristite debatu bilo koju temu za razdvajanje dokaza, vrijednosti, in pretpostavke.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to test claims against counterarguments.
entries.value: Koristite debatu bilo koju temu za testiranje tvrdnji protiv kontraargumenata.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder to convert misses into focused recall prompts.
entries.value: Koristite Flashcard Builder pretvoriti propusnice v fokusiran opoziv prompts.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Exam Prep Planner. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Flashcard Builder, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Exam Prep Planner. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Flashcard Builder, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: Use Flashcards and Spaced Review to turn misses into repeatable memory work.
entries.value: Koristite Flashcards in razmaknute pregled pretvoriti propusnice v ponavljajuči memorijski rad.

entries.source: Use flashcards or quizzes so the article becomes a practice loop, not just advice.
entries.value: Koristite flash kartice ali kvizi tako da članak postaje praksa petlja, a ne samo savjet.

entries.source: Use folders, tags, note summaries, links, and review actions.
entries.value: Koristite mape, oznake, bilješke sažetke, linkte, in pregleda radnje.
